description: A biomedical engineer needs to generate a 'safety margin' model of a patient's skull to assist in designing a custom cranial implant. Using the CT Cranium DICOM dataset already loaded in InVesalius 3, export two 3D surface models (STLs) of the cranium. Export a standard bone segmentation model as a binary STL to /home/ga/Documents/anatomical_skull.stl. Export a second model, created by applying a dilation morphological operation to the bone mask, as a binary STL to /home/ga/Documents/dilated_skull.stl. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
